component.name: qBittorrent Companion
component.summary: A native (C#) desktop remote for your qBittorrent server

description.p: qBittorrent Companion is a cross-platform desktop application written in C# (no browser required) that provides an alternative to the WebUI.
QBC offers these additional features you may have found the WebUI lacking:

ul.li: Multi-tab search with support for simultaneous queries
Live previewing of RSS rule results
A real-time line graph of download and upload speeds
System level notifications with fine-grained control

screenshot.caption: The main dashboard showing active torrents.
